subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty! It is some time since we have had any word or sign from thee. Why art thou downcast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک مدتیست که از شما نه خبری نه اثری چرا افسرده هستی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
